round2Notes.fixApplied: fix-social-button-touch-target increased button padding to meet 44px touch target
round2Notes.result: Button height now 46px on 375×667 viewport — exceeds 44px minimum. VAL-SI-020 now passes.

headlessLimitations: Clipboard API read is blocked in headless Chromium (permission denied). Clipboard write verified via source code review and button feedback ('Copied!').
Web Share API (navigator.share) is not available in headless Chromium. Mobile share behavior verified via source code review; desktop fallback (download + clipboard) tested on mobile viewport.

html2canvas error handling could not be force-triggered in headless Chromium. Error path verified via source code review: try/catch wraps html2canvas call, displays error via

, resets button after 3 seconds.
Landing page (/) auto-redirects to game page. This effectively achieves the same result as clicking Play — user lands on a seeded game page.
